## Checklist

- [ ] `make ci` passes locally (fmt, vet, lint, gocritic, sec, vuln, test, cover, e2e)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change (coverage stays ≥80% per domain)
- [ ] Conventional commit messages (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / config reference) if behavior or config changed
